primary_operations.name: Handle
primary_operations.sdk_call: body, err := io.ReadAll(r.Body); if err != nil { http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest); return }; defer r.Body.Close(); result, err := h.useCase.Execute(body); if err != nil { http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError); return }; w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json"); _, _ = w.Write(result)

code_style_notes: gin handlers natively use *gin.Context — wrap them via gin.WrapH for stdlib http.Handler compatibility
engine.Run(addr) starts an http.Server bound to addr
